chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1772 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7665/2023 3. For hearing of main case 21-12-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that impugned order dated 30.11.2023 has been withdrawn by the competent authority/respondent and the petition having served its purpose, he does not press this petition. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
